.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Update the CodeQL analysis workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Upgrade the Maven compiler plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support compiling code for JDK 21 or may fail to recognize new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag in the compiler plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures consistent module path and API usage for the target JDK.
